packet.claim: Human-AI sensemaking improves when user-stated content, assistant inference, tool observations, and synthetic test data remain separately attributed before memory or hypothesis promotion.
packet.revision_reason: Convert attribution-boundary preservation into a machine-checkable test fixture.
packet.falsification_route: If packets with collapsed attribution pass, the gate fails and the boundary model must be revised.

measurable_variables.name: attribution_collapse_count
measurable_variables.measurement: number of segments whose downstream use conflicts with agent role

measurable_variables.name: private_memory_leak_count
measurable_variables.measurement: number of public-safe packets that attempt to store private identifiers or personal details

packet.next_executable_action: Run validate_agent_boundary_packets.py against this fixture file.

boundary_segments.content: A public-safe abstract user statement about wanting stronger evidence boundaries.
A public-safe assistant inference that the system needs attribution-preserving memory gates.
Synthetic data used only to test validation behavior.

packet.claim: Assistant inference should not be promoted as user-stated content during memory or hypothesis promotion.
packet.falsification_route: If this fixture passes, the validator is allowing inference laundering.
packet.next_executable_action: Reject the fixture and report the segment violation.

boundary_segments.content: The assistant inferred a possible pattern from public-safe abstractions.

packet.claim: Tool observations should remain tool observations until independently interpreted and sourced.
packet.falsification_route: If this fixture passes, tool output can be collapsed into unsourced observation.

measurable_variables.name: tool_collapse_count
measurable_variables.measurement: tool-observed segments allowed to collapse into observation

packet.next_executable_action: Reject the fixture and route it to the contradiction ledger.

boundary_segments.content: A public-safe tool output from an external retrieval step.

packet.claim: Private rejected packets must not be admitted into public-safe research memory.
packet.revision_reason: Negative fixture for privacy boundary enforcement.
packet.falsification_route: If this fixture passes, private-rejected packets are incorrectly admitted.
packet.next_executable_action: Reject and quarantine; do not store in public-safe memory.
